g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with GetQueue until the lifecycle is DELETED or the resource is not found.
Delete the owned Secret after OCI delete confirmation.
Create is asynchronous; later list or get calls discover the OCID instead of polling the create work request.
Move the queue compartment before other supported queue updates.
Treat empty customEncryptionKeyId as a no-op rather than key removal.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
upsert the owned Secret for the usable active resource
- The create work-request ID is not persisted or polled.
- The first name-resolved bind records the OCID and defers UpdateQueue
